privileged_info_summary: The task utilizes the synthetic GNU Health 5.0 demo database. It has been verified that the patient 'Roberto Carlos' and health professional 'Cameron Cordara' exist in this dataset. The required ICD-10 code (I10 for Essential Hypertension) and medication ('Amlodipine' at '5' mg) accurately correspond to database entries and medical standards. The lab type code 'LIPID' is explicitly supported (or injected via setup scripts). The follow-up scheduling constraints (18-42 days) directly match the task prompt and evaluation script logic.
